title: Calculus — Final Review
description: Flagship-style final: derivatives, integrals, series, and exam workflow.

blocks.title: Common derivatives
blocks.markdown:
| f | f' |
|---|----|
| x^n | n x^{n-1} |
| e^x | e^x |
| ln x | 1/x |
| sin x | cos x |
| cos x | -sin x |
| tan x | sec² x |

blocks.title: Technique picker
blocks.markdown:
| Form | Try |
|------|-----|
| f(g) g' | u-sub |
| product of unlike | parts |
| rational | partial fractions |
| √(a²-x²) etc. | trig sub |

blocks.title: Exam problem flow
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Read carefully] --> B{Diff / int / series?}
  B -->|Diff| C[Chain/product/quotient]
  B -->|Int| D[Pick technique]
  B -->|Series| E[Known series or tests]
  C --> F[Simplify + check domain]
  D --> F
  E --> F

blocks.title: Quick tips
blocks.markdown:
| Pitfall | Fix |
|---------|-----|
| Forgot +C | Indefinite only |
| Chain rule miss | Inner derivative |
| Series radius | Ratio/root test |
| Units/domain | State assumptions |
